title: TestRealData self-skips when bundled data is absent
evidence: internal/soccer/integration_test.go:32 t.Skip("bundled Kaggle data not found..."). Runs in this archive (data/kaggle present) but skips silently if data is vendored away.
suggestion: Acceptable guard; consider t.Fatal or a build tag so an accidental data-less run is visibly distinguished from a pass.

title: Moderate statement coverage (~40.5%)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.4053; format.go (text rendering) and several arg-parse branches in tools.go are not directly exercised by tests.
suggestion: Add table-driven tests over the Format* functions and tools.go arg coercion to lift coverage of the presentation layer.

title: Capabilities beyond spec: extended match stats and competition discovery
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:273 list_competitions tool; load.go:295-298 parses shots/corners (HasStats) from BR-Football dataset.
suggestion: None — surfaced as positive scope coverage, not a deduction.

title: Optional external APIs (API-Football, TheSportsDB) not integrated
evidence: main.go + load.go read only local CSVs; no HTTP client. Spec lists these sources as Optional (TASK.md:132-147).
suggestion: None required — optional per spec; noted for cross-run comparison.
